message:
Fix clippy errors: collapsible-if let-chain and boolean logic bug in superblock_formation, remove unused import

- Collapse nested if/if-let into Rust 2024 let-chain in form_superblock guard generation
- Replace always-true assertion (a < b || a >= b) with meaningful Ord test in guard_kind_ordering
- Remove unused DegradedOperationKind import from hostcall_batch_transport_integration

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
